_comment: Tier-2 Layer-C: NGSolve linear_elasticity numerical-correctness gate. Cross-backend mirror of fenics + skfem elasticity_mms_convergence. Same MMS — u = (sin(πx)·sin(πy), sin(2πx)·sin(2πy)), plane strain E=1.0/ν=0.3. Distinct catalog API: Mesh(unit_square.GenerateMesh(maxh)), VectorH1(mesh, order=k, dirichlet=...), Grad/Trace/Id symbolic CoefficientFunctions, BilinearForm + LinearForm + Assemble, a.mat.Inverse(fes.FreeDofs()) — with Dirichlet BC set via gfu.Set(u_ex, definedon=mesh.Boundaries(...)). Asserts order=1 maxh=1/16 L2 <= 1.5e-2, order=2 <= 5e-4, P1 EOC maxh=1/8 → 1/16 in [1.5, 2.5] (wider than Cartesian backends because Netgen unstructured meshes vary topology between maxh values). Verified on 2026-06-01: order1=1.31e-2, order2=3.04e-4, EOC=2.227. CROSS-BACKEND AGREEMENT: ngsolve 1.31e-2 vs fenics 8.99e-3 vs skfem 8.96e-3 — within 50% across all 3 backends despite Netgen's unstructured mesh having larger element-size variability.
